div1.entryFree: Diligent, assiduous, attentive (opposed to negligent): hath into bondage brought my too d. ear, Tp. III, 1, 42. by d. discovery, Lr. V, 1, 53. Especially == officious: how d. I am to dress thy meat myself, Shr. IV, 3, 39. he knows you are too d. Tim. III, 4, 40. a d. follower of mine, Cymb. III, 5, 121. a page so kind, so duteous, d. V, 5, 86.
